justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x with corresponding dependency changes (mockito-core, springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui). It uses Java 21 pattern matching for instanceof in SessionUtil.java and Path.of() in FileService.java. However, WebSecurityConfig still extends the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (though commented migration hint is present), and the pom.xml has a duplicate lombok dependency entry. The migration is mostly complete but not flawless due to the remaining deprecated adapter class.
